name: EdwLoadMbrPcpAttrbtnDRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte_min_run_cyc AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'PCMH' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND ((SRC_SYS_CD = 'TREO' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle}) OR (SRC_SYS_CD = 'BCBSKC' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSBCBSKCRunCycle}) OR (SRC_SYS_CD = 'BCBSA' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IdsBCBSARunCycle})) GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T INNER JOIN cte_min_run_cyc M ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = M.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = M.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = M.TRGT_SYS_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= M.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
Â© Copyright 2013 Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Kansas City

Called by:
                    IdsMbrPcpAttrbtnDCntl

Processing:
                    Extracts the P_RUN_CYC records for IDS PCMH with the EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'.  
                    These rows are used to update the P_RUN_CYCLE load indicator field for the particular source and subject.  
                    All run cycles >= to the current run cycle where the indicator is "N" are updated to "Y"

Control Job Rerun Information: 
                    Previous Run Successful:    Restart, no other steps necessary
                    Previous Run Aborted:         Restart, no other steps necessary

Annotations:
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
EDW MBR PCP ATTRBTN Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS PCMH with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
